positive: A whimsical, deeply saturated illustration of a stylized forest grove, featuring bioluminescent flora and a hidden waterfall. The central element is a graceful, stylized fox sitting on a root, looking toward the falling water. The style is highly detailed vector illustration mixed with neo-Art Nouveau aesthetic, using strong silhouettes and dramatic, contrasting colors (deep teals, emerald greens, sapphire blues, punctuated by glowing gold and violet accents). Composition should be centered, suitable for a repeatable seamless print on apparel. Excellent composition, high contrast, smooth gradients, crisp linework, digital painting, concept art, symmetrical.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, abstract, bokeh, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, monochrome, jpeg artifacts, messy, out of focus
